name: worktrail-raycast
title: Worktrail
description: Search Worktrail and copy inert Codex resume commands from Raycast.
author: fabiencampana

commands.name: resume-worktrail
commands.title: Resume Worktrail
commands.subtitle: Worktrail
commands.description: Search ranked Worktrail targets and copy a Codex resume command.

preferences.name: pnpmPath
preferences.title: pnpm executable path
preferences.description: Absolute path to pnpm. Run `which pnpm` in your terminal if Raycast cannot find pnpm.

preferences.name: worktrailProjectPath
preferences.title: Worktrail Project Path
preferences.description: Repository containing the Worktrail pnpm script.

preferences.name: databasePath
preferences.title: Database Path
preferences.description: Optional Worktrail database passed through as --db.

preferences.name: resultLimit
preferences.title: Result Limit
preferences.description: Maximum ranked targets requested from Worktrail.

preferences.name: includeArchived
preferences.title: Archived Results
preferences.description: Include archived Worktrail runs in resume results.
preferences.label: Include archived runs
